hero.title: Choose AS or A2, then move through one chemistry library.
hero.subtitle: Start with the stage you need, then use interactive practice when you want quick drills.

entry_cards.title: AS Chemistry
entry_cards.description: Start with foundations, inorganic chemistry, and the first organic routes.

entry_cards.title: A2 Chemistry
entry_cards.description: Start with physical chemistry, transition elements, and the core A2 organic set.

entry_cards.title: Interactive Practice
entry_cards.description: Use quick drills and tools when you want short practice between longer revision sessions.

notes.editorial_rule: Keep homepage focused on route choice and top-level featured documents instead of turning it into a mixed library page.
